extracted_information: The web content discusses ADA compliance for cannabis websites, outlining general accessibility requirements based on WCAG 2.1 and specific 'must-haves' for marijuana sites, including an age gate. While age verification is mandated for cannabis sites, the content does not provide specific details on how to implement age verification in an accessible manner for users with disabilities.

specifications.ada_law_scope: Eliminates discrimination against people with disabilities in all public spaces, including jobs, schools, public transports, and both public and privately owned/operated places, extending to business websites.
specifications.web_content_accessibility_guidelines: WCAG 2.1 (Web Content Accessibility Guidelines) is recommended for coding accessibility features.
specifications.image_accessibility: Use alternative text (ALT) or 'title' attributes for image descriptions, accessible to screen readers and visible on hover.
specifications.perceivable_content: Include text alternatives for all non-text content (videos, gifs); include captions/alternatives for multimedia; ensure content can be presented in different ways using assistive software; make content easier to hear/see.
specifications.operable_content: Ensure all functionality is keyboard-accessible; avoid seizure-inducing content (flashing, flickering); provide sufficient time for users to read/use content (slideshows); make site easily navigable (headers, buttons, menus, chat box).

details: Perceivable content (text alternatives, captions, flexible presentation, clear audio/visuals)
Operable content (keyboard navigation, no seizure triggers, sufficient time, easy navigation)

Age Gate: Mandatory for all marijuana websites to prevent minor access (per Cole Memorandum). The content states having an age gate shows effort to meet compliance standards, but does not detail accessible implementation methods for disabled users.
Symptoms: Allow visitors to select symptoms to find appropriate cannabis products.
Menu and Products: Provide an easily browsable product menu for customers.

features.details: Partnership with an AI system for ADA compliance, claiming achievement within 48 hours.

geographical_data.country: United States (implied by 'Americans with Disabilities Act' and 'Cole Memorandum')
